title: Superflat Survival
description: A simple mod that allows the capability for you to beat Minecraft in superflat with no structures!
body:
Welcome to your new Superflat Survival Experience!
 
Superflat Survival creates a whole new way to beat Minecraft Superflat. Instead of having structures, there are no structures. You might be wondering, How do I do that? Well by bonemealing dirt to get a sapling, ripping up carpet into filters, cooking cobblestone into lava, and more. This is a whole new way to play Minecraft at a slow pace. Suffer alone or with friends get out on that flat world today!
